markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 11
#### Article 48
##### § 2287 — Special events

ATVs operated at special events pursuant to § 2408 (Special events) may be exempted from the provisions of this article concerning registration.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
